item.title: “In summary, there is very little evidence for LLMs benefiting patients or doctors for health outcom...
item.description:
“In summary, there is very little evidence for LLMs benefiting patients or doctors for health outcomes” - Dr. @EricTopol
Read his full review here: https://t.co/vHKo35n2BT
--- @GaryMarcus | ❤️ 6 | 🔁 3 | 💬 1 | 👁 543
item.author: @GaryMarcus

item.title: I swear I don't get paid anything though, just like this product and I dislike most other products a...
item.author: @levelsio

item.title: Old days: “Bigshot chief scientist of major corporation can’t handle criticism of the work he hypes”...
item.description:
Old days: “Bigshot chief scientist of major corporation can’t handle criticism of the work he hypes”
New days: “Same bigshot no longer hypes LLMs; can’t handle the fact that someone else noticed flaws in LLMs before he did.”
The only constant is … Yann LeCun’s ego. https://t.co/ynGkrG4Q4u
--- @GaryMarcus | ❤️ 29 | 🔁 0 | 💬 4 | 👁 2170
item.author: @GaryMarcus
